judgment.summary: Lam Research exhibits strong growth and profitability, supported by a healthy balance sheet, though it trades at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 7.9%; next earnings date is 2026-07-29.
positives: Revenue growth 23.8% YoY and earnings growth 40.8% YoY indicate robust top and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 30.9% and Return on Equity 66.8% demonstrate excellent operational efficiency and shareholder returns.
Strong free cash flow of $4.35B (TTM) provides financial flexibility.
Analyst consensus is a buy with a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 55.22 and Forward P/E of 36.83 indicate a high valuation.
PEG ratio of 1.71 suggests the stock may be slightly overvalued relative to its expected growth.
Beta of 1.82 implies higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) has no recent headlines to provide immediate context for traders. The stock's price action will likely be driven by broader market trends and its upcoming earnings report. Investors should monitor semiconductor industry news and any analyst commentary leading up to the next earnings release.
